section.title: NAME
section.p: listProcedures - Enumerate all of the stored procedure fundtion.

section.title: DESCRIPTION
section.p: Enumerate all of the stored procedure fundtion.

plentry.pd: Conditions is empty, enumerate all the functions, is not empty, the enumeration aualified function.

section.p: Defined listProcedures() method, only a json lbject type parameter name condition, the function returns the input value matches the specified value, otherwise return all functions.

section.title: Examples
section.p: Return function named sum specified records
